title: Poster Boys
subTitle: Three men face ridicule from their families and fellow villagers after they appear on a poster that promotes vasectomies. They soon embark on a mission to prove that they are victims of the system.

title: Jodi
subTitle: An accident brings Kapil and Kanchana Mala together, who then begin dating. However, their dream of getting married is interrupted due to disapproval and revenge.

title: Tan- Badan
subTitle: A spoilt young man wants to marry the girl of his dreams, but instead he has to marry an innocent village girl who knows nothing of the intimate relationship between a husband and wife.

title: Bittu Bak Bak
subTitle: Bittu, a movie fanatic and student, always talks in Bollywood references. However, this drives his teacher crazy as he always tries to make Bittu studious and excel in his academics.

title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkaar
subTitle: Tinni and Micky fall in love and introduce each other to the respective families. However, after meeting Micky's overbearing family, Tinni contacts a break-up consultant to sabotage the wedding.

title: No.1 Dilwala
subTitle: The bond between two friends, who have been inseparable since their childhood, is affected when they meet a beautiful woman.

title: Varudu Kaavalenu
subTitle: Bhoomi, the owner of an eco-friendly start-up business in Hyderabad, is reluctant to get married. However, this begins to change when she meets Aakash, a successful architect.

title: Jaanu
subTitle: Ram and Jaanu are childhood sweethearts who meet at their school reunion after nearly two decades. Although initially awkward, they soon start recollecting their past and resolve their differences.

title: CID
subTitle: Ishaan gets into a quarrel with safety officer Gyaan, and moments later, an attendant gets shot. Moreover, after a few years, Gyaan is found murdered in a chair in an old mill.

title: CID
subTitle: Two judges are playing their usual game of chess when someone sends them a gift containing a mysterious substance that kills them both. Soon, the CID team tries to find out who sent the package.

subTitle: CID has been set up and suspicion falls on Daya. Later, when the team investigates, they discover a web of lies and ultimately the true culprit of the elaborate trap.

subTitle: CID investigates a murder at a footwear showroom's inauguration. Further, workers claim haunted shoes killed the victim, adding mystery to the case.

subTitle: A teen plots his own kidnapping to scam his father, but when an unhinged cop takes the case, the unsuspecting kidnappers find themselves in a spiraling chaos.

subTitle: Jeyaraj and Dhivya, two heartbroken individuals, fall for each other, but their families' disapproval threatens to tear them apart.

subTitle: Raju, an Indian fisherman, is arrested after accidentally straying into foreign waters and faces a fraught journey home to his beloved Satya.

title: Legend The Terror
subTitle: A young man comes to India from Dubai with his fiance for their wedding. After his arrival, he clashes with an evil man with whom his family shares a past.

subTitle: After a villager secures a marriage alliance with a city boy for his only daughter, he prepares to offer a sacrifice to the gods. However, things go awry during the ceremony.

title: CID
subTitle: When a few thieves get killed, the CID team finds a radioactive detector machine. Later, the team comes across a man, who identifies himself as a RAW agent.

title: CID
subTitle: Sanjana is asked to surrender the mysterious briefcase because of which she was kidnapped. Meanwhile, Daya manages to save Abhijeet in the nick of time.

title: CID

title: CID
subTitle: Mayank and Jigar escape after robbing a bank, but they die in a car accident. However, after examining the evidence, Dr Salunkhe informs Team CID that they were shot dead.

title: CID
subTitle: Kamal, a novelist, is found dead on a busy beach. Later, Kamal's wife informs Team CID that he used to go to isolated beaches to write his novels.

title: CID
subTitle: A gang of stuntmen on motorcycles rob a van containing cash. The CID team enquire at nearby stunt schools and discover that a lady named Payal is behind the spate of robberies.

subTitle: Jamuna, a cab driver, accidentally becomes an accomplice to a crime. Later, she tries to get herself out of the mess she is dragged in.

subTitle: Executives on a weekend trip find themselves in danger when they learn that a storm has caused the local river to become infested with sharks.

subTitle: The bonding between a freshly married couple gets threatened when a CD containing their private clips goes missing. Soon, they both navigate through hilarious experiences.

subTitle: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
subTitle: A young man, from a small town, with romantic inclinations gets gainfully employed to marry the woman he desires. However, he breaks an oath to Lord Shiva and becomes trapped for his reneging.

title: Kung Fu Hustle
subTitle: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.

title: CID
subTitle: After a car crash, prominent businessman Viraj makes headlines as he is rushed to the hospital. Later, Team CID gets involved when Viraj disappears from his hospital room and leaves a dead body behind.

title: CID
subTitle: The CID team tries to crack the mysterious plan of the criminal biker group. However, Golendo and his men hoodwink the team and storm the government gold reserve.

title: CID
subTitle: A fallen chandelier leads to a woman's puzzling death in her home, prompting a CID investigation. Meanwhile, the detectives discover unusual circumstances surrounding the incident.

subTitle: Two elevator servicemen, while on their inspection rounds, witness three goons about to murder a man. The goons, not wanting to leave any witnesses, pursue the servicemen.
